title: Elon Musk Announces AI Film Adaptation of Homer's Odyssey
description: According to The Guardian and The Hill, Elon Musk announced an AI film adaptation of Homer's Odyssey. The Hollywood Reporter provides details on the project.

sources.title: Elon Musk says Grok Imagine will make ‘historically accurate’ AI adaptation of Homer’s Odyssey
Elon Musk says Grok will make ‘historically accurate’ Odyssey movie this year
What’s Really In the AI Odyssey Film

sections.heading: Project Announcement
paragraphs: According to The Guardian, Elon Musk says Grok Imagine will make a 'historically accurate' AI adaptation of Homer's Odyssey. The Hill reports that Musk stated Grok will make this 'historically accurate' Odyssey movie this year.

sections.heading: Content and Production
paragraphs: The Hollywood Reporter published an article titled 'What’s Really In the AI Odyssey Film,' discussing the content of the production. The Guardian also reported on the use of Grok Imagine for the adaptation.

sections.heading: Search Trend Context
paragraphs: The term 'film' is trending in the FR region with a search volume lower bound of 100. Google Trends data reflects the popularity of search terms during the snapshot taken on July 23, 2026.

faq.q: What is the subject of the new film project?
faq.a: According to The Guardian and The Hill, the project is an AI adaptation of Homer's Odyssey.
The Guardian and The Hill report that Elon Musk says Grok and Grok Imagine will be involved in making the film.

faq.q: When is the movie expected to be released?
faq.a: According to The Hill, Elon Musk says the movie will be made this year.
